policy: AIR-DROW uses local same-origin interface assets, MediaPipe modules, WASM files and the verified hand model. Your drawing session is private to this device unless you choose an export, share or optional AI action.
note: Kurdish UI uses local Noto Kufi Arabic. Drawing, hand tracking, projects, backups, exports, App readiness, On-device launch validation and Hand drawing check work locally in the browser.

interfaceIconSystem.method: Semantic CSS mask classes backed by the complete local user icon pack

releaseStatus: v8.2.0 Visual Guidance & Persistent Settings Refinement: full live hand guidance, persistent local preferences, compact Kurdish mobile typography and protected physical actions.
